name: Seed 2.1 Pro
archDisplay: Proprietary deep-thinking agent model, architecture undisclosed
note: ByteDance's newest flagship (successor to Seed 2.0 Pro from Feb 2026), positioned by ByteDance as competitive with Claude Opus 4.6 at far lower cost; not in corpus (corpus's newest ByteDance entry is Doubao-Seed-1.6 from 2025-06-11). Pricing converted from RMB (6/30 per million input/output) at ~7.1 RMB/USD.
